raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The argument that marginal accuracy gains (0.2–0.5%) plus parameter reduction constitutes a meaningful advance needs logical tightening; 'make stronger' plausibly targets the inferential chain from evidence to contribution claim.","R1.3":"The artifact's most visible weakness is evidence-claim tension: 'improves on prior work' is asserted, but accuracy deltas are tiny and the only baseline is the authors' own v1; this dimension is load-bearing if the delegation means argument-level strengthening.","R1.4":"The novelty delta is framed narrowly against GraphFlow-v1 alone; if 'stronger' means contribution framing, sharper positioning against the broader GNN literature (not just self-baseline) becomes load-bearing.","R1.6":"If 'make this stronger' is a prose directive, sentence-level rhetoric, impact register, and claim precision are load-bearing; the current text is functional but flat and hedged ('we expect', 'we believe')."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus primarily on improving prose quality and rhetorical impact, or on restructuring the argument to better justify why the parameter-reduction gain and marginal accuracy improvements (0.2–0.5% over self-baseline only) constitute a significant contribution?"}

rationale.R1.2: The argument that marginal accuracy gains (0.2–0.5%) plus parameter reduction constitutes a meaningful advance needs logical tightening; 'make stronger' plausibly targets the inferential chain from evidence to contribution claim.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact's most visible weakness is evidence-claim tension: 'improves on prior work' is asserted, but accuracy deltas are tiny and the only baseline is the authors' own v1; this dimension is load-bearing if the delegation means argument-level strengthening.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty delta is framed narrowly against GraphFlow-v1 alone; if 'stronger' means contribution framing, sharper positioning against the broader GNN literature (not just self-baseline) becomes load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: If 'make this stronger' is a prose directive, sentence-level rhetoric, impact register, and claim precision are load-bearing; the current text is functional but flat and hedged ('we expect', 'we believe').

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus primarily on improving prose quality and rhetorical impact, or on restructuring the argument to better justify why the parameter-reduction gain and marginal accuracy improvements (0.2–0.5% over self-baseline only) constitute a significant contribution?
